refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific sub-functions to address the distinct aspects of worksite mapping: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation, which are critical for operational safety and effectiveness.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, identified obstacles, and clearly marked work zones, validated against ground truth data and stakeholder acceptance.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.
DP2: Implement a geospatial data processing algorithm for terrain analysis.
DP3: Use GIS-based work-zone modeling with dynamic updates.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically integrates terrain and obstacle mapping via sensor fusion, minimizing coupling complexity by modular sensor data processing.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data noise affecting mapping accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust error handling.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding redundancy in sensor data processing to mitigate noise and improve reliability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, processing worksite mapping, and providing outputs to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle module.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite map data to Teleoperation and Vehicle modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the module integrates sensor fusion and mapping logic; low diffusion indicating minimal duplication.
Vehicle provides raw sensor data but does not process mapping; some diffusion risk if mapping logic is duplicated here.
Primarily consumes mapping data; risk if mapping logic is duplicated for local processing.
Safety Services consumes alerts but does not process mapping; high diffusion risk if mapping logic is duplicated.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing centralized.
Dependency on network link reliability for data exchange.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate partitioning sensor data pre-processing to Vehicle module if performance issues arise.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain and obstacle analysis to sensor fusion approach.

diffusion_risks: Minimal risk as mapping logic is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best architectural boundary for the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and DP to IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor performance and consider offloading pre-processing to Vehicle if needed.
Add redundancy and error handling for sensor data to meet safety criticality.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements and safety constraints with clear architectural boundaries and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensors are available and reliable.
Network link supports required data throughput and latency.
open_risks: Sensor noise and data fusion errors impacting mapping accuracy.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing.
Verification test results of worksite mapping accuracy.
